channel.title: Frontity release: Improvements to Mars Theme
channel.description:
In this release, we have improved Mars Theme so it's even more useful to learn how Frontity works with an example of how to create a mobile menu and a lot of new comments in the code.
We still want to [add other improvements](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/223). If you know Frontity and want to help, let us know in the issue :slight_smile:
### Features
* [#233](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/233): Add Menu Toggle button to Mars Theme. Thanks to [@segunadebayo](https://github.com/segunadebayo). * [#232](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/232): Add comments to Mars Theme. Thanks to [@segunadebayo](https://github.com/segunadebayo).
### Bug Fixes
* [#238](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/238): Fix secondary chunks (`chunk-1~chunk-2.xxx.js`) when code-splitting. Thanks to [@luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz).
We are also switching from conventional changelog to [changesets](https://github.com/atlassian/changesets) and from Travis to GitHub actions to improve the way we work.
> :bulb: To keep Frontity and its packages updated, you can follow [this guide](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/keep-frontity-updated) of our documentation.

item.title: Frontity release: Improvements to Mars Theme
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
In this release, we have improved Mars Theme so it’s even more useful to learn how Frontity works with an example of how to create a mobile menu and a lot of new comments in the code.

We still want to add other improvements. If you know Frontity and want to help, let us know in the issue

Features

  • #233: Add Menu Toggle button to Mars Theme. Thanks to @segunadebayo.
  • #232: Add comments to Mars Theme. Thanks to @segunadebayo.

Bug Fixes

  • #238: Fix secondary chunks (chunk-1~chunk-2.xxx.js) when code-splitting. Thanks to @luisherranz.

We are also switching from conventional changelog to changesets and from Travis to GitHub actions to improve the way we work.

To keep Frontity and its packages updated, you can follow this guide of our documentation.

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity release: Improvements to Mars Theme
